articles.title: BJP Seeks Probe into Petrol Bomb Attack on RSS Office in Ranchi
articles.description: BJP has demanded a deep probe into the alleged petrol bomb attack on the RSS office in Ranchi, questioning law and order in Jharkhand under the JMM-Congress government and calling for identification of the masterminds behind the suspected larger conspiracy.

articles.title: Crude Oil Prices Fall From $126 To $76: Transportation Costs, Rupee To Ease

articles.title: 2026 Kawasaki Ninja 500 Launched With E20-Compliant Engine And Iconic Lime Green Look
articles.description: 2026 Kawasaki Ninja 500 has been launched in India, priced at Rs 5.76 lakh (ex-showroom) and optimised for E20 fuel amid the country's shift towards ethanol-blended petrol. articles.title: Oil prices continue slide amid hopes for peace, opening of Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Brent crude drops to lowest price since early March before signing of framework deal to end US-Israel war on Iran.

articles.title: OMCs get a breather from cooling oil prices, but the coast is not all clear
articles.description: As the West Asia conflict approaches resolution, Indian oil marketing companies (OMCs) are breathing a sigh of relief. With Brent crude prices falling below $80 per barrel, there's optimism for a financial rebound in the sector.

articles.title: Cost of living: Energy Minister considering extension to fuel measures as 'nothing off the table'
articles.description: The government have reduced excise on petrol and diesel as part of the fuel package announced back in April - Energy Minister Darragh O'Brien has said an extension could be on the cards

articles.title: CCTV Captures Men Throwing Petrol Bomb at RSS Office in Ranchi, BJP Alleges 'Larger Conspiracy' | WATCH
